---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# Array { #json2vec.Array }

```python
Array(*children, **data)
```

Repeated nested object group in a `json2vec` schema.

Positional children are treated as fields inside the array.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [name](#json2vec.Array.name) |  |
| [type](#json2vec.Array.type) |  |
| [attention](#json2vec.Array.attention) |  |
| [max_length](#json2vec.Array.max_length) |  |
| [overflow](#json2vec.Array.overflow) |  |
| [n_linear](#json2vec.Array.n_linear) |  |
| [n_layers](#json2vec.Array.n_layers) |  |
| [fields](#json2vec.Array.fields) |  |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [model_post_init](#json2vec.Array.model_post_init) |  |
| [check_unique_child_names](#json2vec.Array.check_unique_child_names) |  |

### model_post_init { #json2vec.Array.model_post_init }

```python
model_post_init(__context)
```



### check_unique_child_names { #json2vec.Array.check_unique_child_names }

```python
check_unique_child_names()
```
